name: Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter, caster sugar, and lemon rind together until fluffy.
2. Gradually sift in the flour and salt, beating until a stiff dough is formed.
3. Roll into 2 sausage shapes.
4. Cut each sausage into slices.
5. Dip the slices into sugar and place on well-greased baking sheets.
6. Put into the oven preheated to 180°C/350°F/GM4 and bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until lightly browned.
